create.description: Name it so you remember where it lives, then pick what it can do.
create.error: Unable to create the token. Please check the form and try again.
create.expiry-description: Leave blank for a token that never expires.
create.scope.read-description: View your characters, games, and dice data.
create.scope.write-description: Create and change data. Includes read access.
create.title: Create API token
description: Authenticate programmatic access to the API with a token instead of your password. A token is shown once when you create it, then never again.
empty: No tokens yet. Create one to start using the API.
heading: API Tokens
reveal.description: This is the only time the full token is shown. Store it somewhere safe. You will not be able to see it again.
reveal.title: Copy your token now
reveal.warning: Anyone with this token can act as you within its scopes. Treat it like a password.
revoke.description: Revoking "{{name}}" permanently deletes it. Any integration using it stops working within a minute. This cannot be undone.
revoke.error: Unable to revoke the token. Please try again.
revoke.label: Revoke {{name}}
revoke.title: Revoke token
usage.heading: Request usage
